HOLOGIRL-FANS_POWER.title: Fans
HOLOGIRL-FANS_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, lose 1 Fan unless you are Singing. Idol forms consume 1 additional Fan each turn.
HOLOGIRL-FANS_POWER.smartDescription: Lose 1 at end of turn unless Singing.
HOLOGIRL-SINGING_POWER.title: Singing
HOLOGIRL-SINGING_POWER.description: Fans do not decay at end of turn. Decreases by 1 at the start of your turn.
HOLOGIRL-FAUNA_FORM_POWER.title: Fauna Form
HOLOGIRL-FAUNA_FORM_POWER.description: You are transformed. At the end of your turn, spend 1 Fan or return to Hologirl.

HOLOGIRL-AMELIA_FORM_POWER.description: You are transformed. At the end of your turn, spend 1 Fan or return to Hologirl.
